deviceFiles.savedForLaterDescription: Device files saved with a patient serial for later processing. Click "Open Saved For Later" to review and load files into the import flow.
deviceFiles.recentDescription: Files received from devices are tracked here for crash protection and recovery. You can view details and attach unprocessed files to medical records.

diagnoses.title: Diagnoses
diagnoses.description: Manage the list of diagnosis tags that can be applied to medical records. Examples: Arthritis, Otitis externa, Hyperthyroidism.
diagnoses.name: Name
diagnoses.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional clinical description for staff reference
diagnoses.deactivateConfirm: Hide this diagnosis from the picker?
diagnoses.deactivateDesc: Existing records that already use it stay unchanged.

managedScanners.title: Managed HID Scanners
managedScanners.description: HID scanners listed here have their input captured exclusively by this app — they stop typing into other windows. Useful for microchip readers that emit chip IDs as keystrokes. Other HID scanners (e.g. POS / barcode) continue to work normally.
managedScanners.addedDesc: Scanner added — Raw Input filter will pick it up immediately.
managedScanners.name: Name
managedScanners.vidHelp: USB VID in decimal (Device Manager → Properties → Details → Hardware IDs).
managedScanners.macOnlyDesc: Raw Input filtering only takes effect on Windows. On macOS this list is editable for parity, but suppression and capture is handled by the existing HID-polling path instead.

detect.title: Detect connected HID devices
detect.showAll: Show all HID devices (not just keyboards/scanners)
detect.help: Lists devices currently attached. Click "Add" on any row to add it to the managed list with VID/PID and name pre-filled. The scan only reads metadata — devices are NOT opened, so other software keeps working normally.
detect.empty: No HID devices found. Plug in your scanner and click Refresh.

backups.title: Backups
backups.description: The application snapshots the database (one per day, kept for 30 days) and mirrors stored files to the destination you choose. A backup runs automatically each time the app starts.

messages.installFailed: Failed to install the update. Please try again later.
messages.upToDateDescription: You are running the latest version!

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar Integration
googleCalendar.syncDescription: Connect your Google Calendar to automatically sync appointments between your veterinary clinic and Google Calendar. This allows you to view and manage appointments from both systems.
googleCalendar.syncHint: Two-way sync between clinic appointments and Google Calendar

messages.connectedDescription: Your Google Calendar has been successfully connected. Appointments will now sync automatically.
messages.authTimeoutDescription: The authorization process timed out after 2 minutes. Please try again.
messages.disconnectedDescription: Your Google Calendar has been disconnected. Appointments will no longer sync.
messages.disconnectFailedDescription: Failed to disconnect from Google Calendar: {{error}}
messages.syncEnabledDescription: Syncing existing appointments to Google Calendar...
messages.initialSyncCompleteDescription: All future appointments have been synced to Google Calendar.
messages.initialSyncFailedDescription: Sync enabled but initial sync failed: {{error}}. You can manually sync using the "Sync Now" button.
messages.syncDisabledDescription: Appointments will no longer sync with Google Calendar.

rooms.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this room?

general.launchAtLoginHint: Start the app minimized to tray on system startup

breeds.title: Breed Management
breeds.noBreeds: No breeds added yet. Click "Add Breed" to create one.
breeds.confirmDeleteTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this breed?
breeds.confirmDeleteDescription: This will only deactivate it if patients are using it.

templates.title: Record Templates
templates.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this template?

lineItems.title: Factura
lineItems.description: Manage reusable factura line item templates for medical records
lineItems.name: Name
lineItems.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional description of the line item
lineItems.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to deactivate this line item?
